title: Senior Software Engineer - Airtel India Capital India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Airtel India Capital India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Airtel India Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Airtel India Capital India:
Airtel India Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Airtel India Capital India!
